math.headline: The Math
math.subhead: Same outcomes, completely different cost structure.

math.new_desc: 3 AI or Die Super Agents/year with 24/7 coverage and ongoing optimization.
roles.headline: Roles We Deploy
roles.subhead: Six featured roles below. Full role library covers every major business function.
roles.super_agent_body: With people, you hire a CFO or a lawyer. Never both. Skills don't stack like that. With Super Agents, they do. We regularly deploy single agents that cover finance and legal, or marketing and sales — because there's no cognitive overhead, no context-switching cost, no divided attention.
roles.super_agent_body2: We call these super-agents. When we scope your deployment, we'll tell you exactly where combining roles saves you money without sacrificing output quality.
multilingual.headline: Your agents speak every language your business does.
multilingual.body: Super Agents are multilingual by default. Documents, invoices, and research can be submitted in any language and any currency — the output comes back in whatever language you need.
multilingual.phone_label: Talk to our AI agent in any language
stats.coverage_label: Equivalent coverage with Super Agents running full-time, all year.

dogfood.headline: We built it. We run it. You hire it.

how.subhead: Five steps from consult to full deployment.

cta.phone_label: Talk to our AI agent in any language
pricing.hero.subhead: You're not buying access to an AI. You're hiring a specialist — configured for your business, integrated into your tools, and upgraded continuously.
pricing.hero.badge: Your team does $330K of work AI handles for $19,400
pricing.tiers.headline: Choose your team size
pricing.tiers.note: Each tier includes full custom configuration, tool integration, and ongoing optimization. This is not a SaaS subscription — it's a deployed specialist.
pricing.comparison.headline: Not a generic agent. A configured expert.
pricing.comparison.subhead: Most people start with ChatGPT. Then they discover agents. Then they realize agents alone aren't enough. Here's the full picture.
pricing.comparison.tier1_desc: A chat interface. Brilliant at answering questions, drafting text, summarizing documents. But the moment you close the tab, it's gone. No memory. No initiative. It only works when you work.
pricing.comparison.tier1_best: One-off tasks, research, drafts. Not for running a business.
pricing.comparison.tier2_desc: A step up — the agent can take actions, run autonomously, and connect to tools. But it's a blank slate. You configure it, you prompt it, you manage it. The platform gives you a car. You still have to build the engine.
pricing.comparison.tier2_best: Technical teams who want to build their own agent. A toolkit, not a hire.
pricing.comparison.tier3_desc: Built on OpenClaw — but configured end-to-end for your business by our team. We do the months of setup work so you don't have to. You get a specialist who already knows your clients, your tone, your tools, and your goals. You manage outcomes, not prompts.
pricing.comparison.tier3_best: Business owners who want to hand off a role — not build a system.
pricing.comparison.diy_p1: OpenClaw costs $5/month because it gives you the raw platform and you do all the work. You spend weeks — realistically months — configuring prompts, wiring up integrations, training it on your business, and debugging failures. Most businesses start, stall, and quietly abandon it. The platform isn't the product. The configured, deployed, running specialist is the product.
pricing.comparison.diy_p2: The $2,000 setup is us doing that months-long work in two weeks. The $500/month keeps the agent current — new model releases, performance improvements, and ongoing tuning as your business evolves. You're not paying for software. You're paying for a specialist who shows up every day and never drops the ball.
pricing.comparison.diy_quote: "You could spin up OpenClaw yourself in an afternoon — but your agent won't know your business, your clients, or your SOPs. That part takes weeks."
pricing.comparison.diy_quote_label: What a DIY deploy actually looks like
pricing.skills.headline: Every agent ships with skills.
pricing.skills.body: Think of it like hiring someone out of college vs. hiring a PhD who's spent years mastering exactly your field. Our agents come pre-loaded with skills we've built, tested, and refined in live operations. When you hire an AI or Die Super Agent, you get our IP — not a blank slate you have to educate from scratch.
pricing.skills.tier1_desc: Knows everything about everything. Knows nothing about you. Like asking a stranger for advice — smart, but zero context.
pricing.skills.tier2_title: Potential, but you supply the training
pricing.skills.tier2_desc: The raw intelligence is there. But you're the professor. You build the curriculum, run the lessons, grade the output. Most businesses burn out before they graduate it.
pricing.skills.tier3_desc: Arrives already trained. Our proprietary skills — honed across real deployments — are embedded from day one. You customize the specifics. We supply the expertise.
pricing.methodology.headline: From signed to live in two weeks.
pricing.methodology.subhead: Every deployment is human-led. We don't hand you a login and disappear. A real person runs you through every step — AI handles the heavy lifting, humans make sure it's right.
pricing.methodology.step00_desc: No decks, no pitch. A short call to make sure we're a fit — what you're running, where the friction is, and whether an AI direct report is the right move right now. If it is, we schedule the Design Session and get moving.
pricing.methodology.step01_desc: Before your Design Session, we send a short questionnaire — 10 questions, 5 minutes. Your answers let us show up prepared: no time wasted on basics, no generic suggestions. We already know your business before the call starts.
pricing.methodology.step02_desc: You talk, we map. A human consultant runs the call while AI structures everything in real time: your workflows, your bottlenecks, your highest-leverage roles. By the end, we know exactly which agent to build first, what it needs to do, and what it'll cost. No obligation — just clarity.
pricing.methodology.step03_desc: We send a scoped proposal — the exact agent we'll build, what it covers, the integrations required, and the total cost. No surprises, no vague estimates. Once you sign off, setup begins immediately and your custom questionnaire arrives within the day.
pricing.methodology.step04_desc: A detailed questionnaire built specifically for your business and the role we're deploying — not a generic intake form. We dig into your brand voice, your clients, your edge cases, your SOPs. You fill it on your schedule. We use it to train your Super Agent with precision.
pricing.methodology.step05_desc: Your Super Agent is live. We walk you through it together — a human consultant shows you exactly how it works, what it can handle, where to push it, and how to get the most out of it from day one. No documentation to wade through. A real person walks you through your actual agent.
pricing.methodology.step06_desc: You're never on your own. Your Super Agent is monitored, improved, and kept current — new model releases applied automatically, performance tuned monthly, and a human available when you need one. Support is AI-first for speed, human-backed for anything that matters.
